name: Rozie Sigils (JavaScript partial)
comment: Injection grammar that paints the Rozie $sigils inside .rzjs script partials. injectionSelector `L:source.rozie.js` confines it to the source.rozie.js top scope (so it can NEVER leak into ordinary .js files), and because it is an injection it wins at EVERY nesting depth. Registered in VS Code via `injectTo: ["source.rozie.js"]` and in the Monaco playground via the Registry `getInjections` option.

magic-identifier.comment: COPY of the canonical `magic-identifier` repository entry in source.rozie (tools/textmate/syntaxes/rozie.tmLanguage.json ~line 595). KEEP IN SYNC when new $-identifiers ship.
magic-identifier.name: variable.language.rozie support.variable.rozie
